testcase.name: test_xdd_line_has_auto_start_disabled
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration6.py:230: in test_xdd_line_has_auto_start_disabled assert data['auto_start_at_day_begin'] == False, f"XDD should have auto_start=false, got {data.get('auto_start_at_day_begin')}" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'auto_start_at_day_begin'

testcase.name: test_get_all_lines

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'auto_start_at_day_begin' in {'auto_resume_after_break': True, 'auto_resume_after_takt': True, 'breaks': [{'duration': 15, 'name': 'Pause Matin', 'start_time': '10:00'}, {'duration': 60, 'name': 'Pause Midi', 'start_time': '12:00'}, {'duration': 15, 'name': 'Pause Après-midi', 'start_time': '15:00'}], 'created_at': '2026-03-12T08:23:16.496668+00:00', ...}
